# GatePass Pro

> QR-powered vehicle and visitor management system for Triumph Tower CHSL — used by security guards, residents, and the building committee.

## Pages

- [Guard Login](/guard): Security guard sign-in for QR vehicle scanning and visitor approvals.
- [Resident Login](/resident): Resident portal to generate guest passes and manage vehicles.
- [Admin Login](/admin): Committee admin panel for managing vehicles, residents, and reports.
- [Visitor Form](/visitor/form): Public self-service form for visitors to request entry.
- [Register](/register): Account registration for residents, guards, and admins.
